overview: Midnight Stag is a Normal-class Beast/Mythic monster found in Ruins. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 21 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 1200, combat radius 100, behavior tree: BT_MidnightStag.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1200 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1200 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 100, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 100. Ability check distance 200.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1200 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
